LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC, ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF DEFENDANT MIGUEL MORALES IS GRANTED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS ORDERED TO RELEASE ANY AND ALL FUNDS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED. THE CLERK SHALL MAIL COPIES OF THE ORDER TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: REYES HUNTER CSR #6576 EMAIL: RHUNTER@SFTC.ORG. (302)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT MIGUEL MORALES ON DECEMBER 28, 2010 ARE VACATED AND SET ASIDE. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR# 7489, MGHENO@SFTC.ORG, REPORTED. (D302/HK)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK's Motion To Vacate Judgment.

Plaintiff LVNV Funding's motion to vacate judgment is granted. The default and default judgment entered against defendant Miguel Morales on December 28, 2010 are vacated and set aside. No opposition filed and good cause shown.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489, mgheno@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Juliana Fredman, Esq. of Bay Area Legal Aid, Tel. 415.982.1300, appearing specially for claimant Miguel Morales, also present in court;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling on PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC, ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION was hearing required. There being no appearance by plaintiff, DEFENDANT MIGUEL MORALES' CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is granted. The levying officer is ordered to release any and all funds held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. The clerk shall mail copies of the order to all parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes Hunter CSR #6576 email: rhunter@sftc.org.
